Capas de seguridad

* Estamos manejando expresiones regulares.

pésima practica de diseño por que volvemos más fácil al atacante vulnerar el sistema:  
![][image1]

{% extends 'base.html' %}

{% block content %}  
\<h1\>Registro nuevo usuario ✍🏼\</h1\>  
\<br /\>

\<form method\="post" action\=""\>  
    {% csrf\_token %}  
     
    {% if form.errors %}  
    \<div class\="alert alert-warning alert-dismissible fade show" role\="alert"\>  
        \<strong\>Error de registro:\</strong\> por favor revise los datos ingresados.  
        \<ul\>  
            {% for field in form %}  
                {% for error in field.errors %}  
                    \<li\>\<strong\>{{ field.label }}:\</strong\> {{ error }}\</li\>  
                {% endfor %}  
            {% endfor %}  
        \</ul\>  
        \<button type\="button" class\="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss\="alert" aria-label\="Close"\>\</button\>  
    \</div\>  
    {% endif %}

    {{ form.as\_p }}

    \<button type\="submit" class\="btn btn-primary"\>  
        Registrar  
    \</button\>  
\</form\>

{% endblock %}  
![][image2]

[form.py](http://form.py) 

\# dcrm/website/forms.py  
from django import forms  
from django.contrib.auth.forms import UserCreationForm  
from django.contrib.auth.models import User

from .models import Record

class UserRegisterForm(UserCreationForm):  
    email \= forms.EmailField(label\="", widget\=forms.EmailInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Correo electronico"}))  
    first\_name \= forms.CharField(label\="", widget\=forms.TextInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Nombre"}))  
    last\_name \= forms.CharField(label\="", widget\=forms.TextInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Apellido"}))

    class Meta:  
        model \= User  
        fields \= \["username", "email", "first\_name", "last\_name", "password1", "password2"\]

    def \_\_init\_\_(self, \*args, \*\*kwargs):  
        super(UserRegisterForm, self).\_\_init\_\_(\*args, \*\*kwargs)

        self.fields\["username"\].widget.attrs\["class"\] \= "form-control"  
        self.fields\["username"\].widget.attrs\["placeholder"\] \= "Nombre de usuario"  
        self.fields\["username"\].label \= ""  
        self.fields\["username"\].help\_text \= (  
            '\<span class="form-text text-muted"\>Requerido. 150 caracteres o menos. '  
            "Letras, digitos y @/./+/-/\_ solamente.\</span\>"  
        )

        self.fields\["password1"\].widget.attrs\["class"\] \= "form-control"  
        self.fields\["password1"\].widget.attrs\["placeholder"\] \= "Contrasena"  
        self.fields\["password1"\].label \= ""  
        self.fields\["password1"\].help\_text \= (  
            '\<ul class="form-text text-muted"\>'  
            "\<li\>Tu contrasena no puede ser demasiado similar a tu otra informacion personal.\</li\>"  
            "\<li\>Tu contrasena debe contener al menos 8 caracteres.\</li\>"  
            "\<li\>Tu contrasena no puede ser una contrasena comun.\</li\>"  
            "\<li\>Tu contrasena no puede ser completamente numerica.\</li\>"  
            "\</ul\>"  
        )

        self.fields\["password2"\].widget.attrs\["class"\] \= "form-control"  
        self.fields\["password2"\].widget.attrs\["placeholder"\] \= "Confirmar contrasena"  
        self.fields\["password2"\].label \= ""  
        self.fields\["password2"\].help\_text \= (  
            '\<span class="form-text text-muted"\>Requerido. Debe coincidir con la contrasena anterior.\</span\>'  
        )

class RecordForm(forms.ModelForm):  
    first\_name \= forms.CharField(label\="", widget\=forms.TextInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Nombre", "class": "form-control"}))  
    last\_name \= forms.CharField(label\="", widget\=forms.TextInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Apellido", "class": "form-control"}))  
    email \= forms.EmailField(label\="", widget\=forms.EmailInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Email", "class": "form-control"}))  
    phone\= forms.CharField(  
        label\="",  
        widget\=forms.TextInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Telefono", "class": "form-control"}),  
    )  
    address \= forms.CharField(label\="", widget\=forms.TextInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Direccion", "class": "form-control"}))  
    city \= forms.CharField(label\="", widget\=forms.TextInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Ciudad", "class": "form-control"}))  
    state \= forms.CharField(label\="", widget\=forms.TextInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Estado", "class": "form-control"}))  
    zip\_code \= forms.CharField(  
        label\="",  
        widget\=forms.TextInput(attrs\={"placeholder": "Codigo Postal", "class": "form-control"}),  
    )

    class Meta:  
        model \= Record  
        fields \= \["first\_name", "last\_name", "email", "phone", "address", "city", "state", "zip\_code"\]

luego usted ingresa [views.py](http://views.py)  
from .models import Record \# type: ignore \# Importamos el modelo Record que hemos definido en models.py.

por favor en este hom  
![][image3]  
esta linea se modifico  return render(request, 'home.html', {'records':Record})

compare la vista

from django.shortcuts import redirect, render\#permite cambiar la plantilla  html con datos  y devolver respuesta

\# Esta es la función que se ejecuta cuando entras a la página  
\# login para incio de sesion  segun el rol  
\#logout para cerrar sesion  
from django.contrib.auth import authenticate, login, logout\# type: ignore \# Importamos las funciones de autenticación, inicio de sesión y cierre de sesión de Django.  
from django.contrib import messages \# type: ignore \#  
from .forms import UserRegisterForm, RecordForm \# type: ignore \# Importamos el formulario de registro de usuarios personalizado que hemos creado en forms.py.  
from .models import Record \# type: ignore \# Importamos el modelo Record que hemos definido en models.py.  
def home(request):\# type: ignore  
    \#si el metodo  de la solicitud  es post, significa que se esta  enviado un formulario  
    \# post esta enviando informacion  
    record \= Record.objects.all()\# type: ignore \# obtenemos todos los registros de la base de datos utilizando el modelo Record. Esto nos permitirá mostrar los registros en la plantilla home.html.  
    if request.method \=='POST': \# pyright: ignore\[reportUnknownMemberType\]  
        \# si  el metodo  de la solicitud  post  significa que se esta en viando el formulario  
        \# aqui podemos manehjar  la logica del formulario  como la autentificacion del usuario  
        username \= request.POST\['username'\] \# pyright: ignore\[reportUnknownVariableType, reportUnusedVariable, reportUnknownMemberType\] \#  ontiene este valor des de  formulario  
        password \= request.POST\['password'\] \# type: ignore  
        user \= authenticate(request, username\=username, password\= password) \# type: ignore  
        if user is not None: \# valor o nulo  
            login(request, user) \# pyright: ignore\[reportUnknownArgumentType\] \# indicando la sesion  
            \#muestra el mensaje de exito  
            messages.success(request,"ingresado exitosamente") \# pyright: ignore\[reportUnknownArgumentType\]  
            return redirect('home')  
        else:  
            \# si las credenciales no fueron existosas  
            messages.error(request," las credenciales son invalidas \!\!📢") \# pyright: ignore\[reportUnknownArgumentType\]  
            return render(request, 'home.html', {})  \# type: ignore  
    else:  
        \# si el metodo  de la solicitud no es POST, simplemente renderiza la plantilla 'home.html  
        return render(request, 'home.html', {'records':record })\# type: ignore \# El tercer argumento es un diccionario para pasar datos a la plantilla, pero aquí lo dejamos vacío por ahora.  
\# funcion para logiar

![][image4]

para que ustedes cambien el estilo

{% extends 'base.html' %}  
{% block content %}

\<style\>  
    :root {  
        \--primary-blue: \#0066cc;  
        \--gradient-start: \#0052a3;  
        \--gradient-end: \#0073e6;  
    }

    .login-split-container {  
        min-height: calc(100vh \- 56px); /\* Ajustar según altura de tu navbar \*/  
        display: flex;  
        margin: 0;  
        padding: 0;  
    }

    /\* Sección izquierda \- Azul con degradado \*/  
    .login-left-section {  
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(\--gradient-start) 0%, var(\--gradient-end) 100%);  
        flex: 1;  
        display: flex;  
        flex-direction: column;  
        justify-content: flex-start;  
        align-items: center;  
        padding: 3rem 2rem;  
        color: white;  
        position: relative;  
        overflow: hidden;  
    }

    /\* Forma curva en el borde derecho \*/  
    .login-left-section::after {  
        content: '';  
        position: absolute;  
        right: \-50px;  
        top: 0;  
        width: 100px;  
        height: 100%;  
        background: white;  
        border-radius: 50% 0 0 50%;  
    }

    .login-rocket-icon {  
        font-size: 4rem;  
        margin-bottom: 1.5rem;  
        animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite;  
    }

    @keyframes float {  
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }  
        50% { transform: translateY(\-10px); }  
    }

    .login-welcome-text {  
        text-align: center;  
        z-index: 1;  
        width: 100%;  
        max-width: 1180px;  
    }

    .login-welcome-text h1 {  
        font-size: 2.5rem;  
        font-weight: 300;  
        margin-bottom: 1rem;  
    }

    .login-welcome-text p {  
        font-size: 1.1rem;  
        opacity: 0.9;  
        max-width: 560px;  
        margin: 0 auto;  
        line-height: 1.6;  
    }

    /\* Sección derecha \- Formulario \*/  
    .login-right-section {  
        flex: 1;  
        display: flex;  
        flex-direction: column;  
        justify-content: center;  
        padding: 3rem 5rem;  
        background: white;  
    }

    .login-header {  
        text-align: right;  
        margin-bottom: 3rem;  
    }

    .login-header h2 {  
        color: var(\--primary-blue);  
        font-weight: 400;  
        font-size: 2rem;  
    }

    .login-form-control {  
        border: 1px solid \#e0e0e0;  
        padding: 0.8rem 1rem;  
        font-size: 1rem;  
        transition: all 0.3s ease;  
    }

    .login-form-control:focus {  
        border-color: var(\--primary-blue);  
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.2rem rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.15);  
    }

    .login-form-label {  
        color: \#666;  
        font-weight: 500;  
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;  
    }

    .login-required::after {  
        content: ' \*';  
        color: \#dc3545;  
    }

    .login-btn {  
        background-color: var(\--primary-blue);  
        border: none;  
        padding: 0.8rem 2rem;  
        font-size: 1rem;  
        border-radius: 4px;  
        transition: all 0.3s ease;  
        float: right;  
        margin-top: 1rem;  
        color: white;  
    }

    .login-btn:hover {  
        background-color: var(\--gradient-start);  
        transform: translateY(\-2px);  
        box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 82, 163, 0.3);  
        color: white;  
    }

    .login-input-group-text {  
        background-color: transparent;  
        border-right: none;  
        color: \#999;  
        padding: 0.8rem 1rem;  
    }

    .login-form-control.login-with-icon {  
        border-left: none;  
    }

    .login-input-group {  
        display: flex;  
        align-items: stretch;  
    }

    .login-input-group .login-input-group-text {  
        border: 1px solid \#e0e0e0;  
        border-right: none;  
        border-radius: 0.375rem 0 0 0.375rem;  
    }

    .login-input-group .login-form-control {  
        border-radius: 0 0.375rem 0.375rem 0;  
        flex: 1;  
    }

    /\* Responsive \*/  
    @media (max-width: 768px) {  
        .login-split-container {  
            flex-direction: column;  
        }

        .login-left-section::after {  
            display: none;  
        }

        .login-left-section {  
            min-height: 40vh;  
            padding: 2rem;  
        }

        .login-right-section {  
            padding: 2rem;  
        }  
    }

    /\* Mensajes de Django \*/  
    .login-messages {  
        position: fixed;  
        top: 80px;  
        right: 20px;  
        z-index: 1050;  
    }

    .records-table-wrapper {  
        width: 100%;  
        max-width: 1120px;  
        margin: 2rem auto 0;  
        overflow-x: auto;  
        border-radius: 8px;  
        background: \#ffffff;  
        padding: 0.75rem;  
        box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(0, 32, 76, 0.24);  
    }

    .records-table {  
        margin-bottom: 0;  
        min-width: 960px;  
        border-collapse: separate;  
        border-spacing: 0;  
        text-align: left;  
        vertical-align: middle;  
        background: white;  
    }

    .records-table th {  
        white-space: nowrap;  
        font-weight: 600;  
        font-size: 0.85rem;  
    }

    .records-table td {  
        white-space: nowrap;  
        font-size: 0.9rem;  
    }

    .records-table thead th {  
        background: \#f1f5f9;  
        color: \#1f2937;  
        border-bottom: 1px solid \#d8dee6;  
        padding: 0.95rem 0.85rem;  
    }

    .records-table tbody td,  
    .records-table tbody th {  
        color: \#263238;  
        padding: 0.9rem 0.85rem;  
        border-bottom: 1px solid \#edf1f5;  
    }

    .records-table .table-active td,  
    .records-table .table-active th {  
        background-color: \#f6f9ff;  
    }

    .records-table tbody tr:hover td,  
    .records-table tbody tr:hover th {  
        background-color: \#eaf2ff;  
    }

    .records-table th:first-child,  
    .records-table td:first-child {  
        border-left: 0;  
    }

    .records-empty {  
        padding: 1.5rem;  
        color: \#5f6b7a;  
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {  
        .login-left-section {  
            padding: 2rem 1rem;  
        }

        .login-welcome-text h1 {  
            font-size: 1.8rem;  
        }

        .login-welcome-text p {  
            font-size: 1rem;  
        }

        .records-table-wrapper {  
            box-shadow: none;  
            overflow: visible;  
            background: transparent;  
            padding: 0;  
            margin-top: 1.5rem;  
        }

        .records-table,  
        .records-table thead,  
        .records-table tbody,  
        .records-table th,  
        .records-table td,  
        .records-table tr {  
            display: block;  
        }

        .records-table thead {  
            display: none;  
        }

        .records-table {  
            min-width: 0;  
            background: transparent;  
        }

        .records-table tr {  
            margin-bottom: 1rem;  
            border-radius: 8px;  
            overflow: hidden;  
            background: white;  
            box-shadow: 0 10px 26px rgba(0, 32, 76, 0.2);  
        }

        .records-table td,  
        .records-table th {  
            display: flex;  
            justify-content: space-between;  
            align-items: flex-start;  
            gap: 1rem;  
            white-space: normal;  
            border-bottom: 1px solid \#e9ecef;  
            padding: 0.8rem 1rem;  
            text-align: right;  
            word-break: break-word;  
        }

        .records-table td::before {  
            content: attr(data-label);  
            flex: 0 0 42%;  
            text-align: left;  
            font-weight: 600;  
            color: \#0052a3;  
        }

        .records-table th::before {  
            content: "Registro";  
            flex: 0 0 42%;  
            text-align: left;  
            font-weight: 600;  
            color: \#0052a3;  
        }  
    }

    @media (min-width: 769px) and (max-width: 1200px) {  
        .login-left-section {  
            padding: 2.5rem 1.25rem;  
        }

        .records-table-wrapper {  
            max-width: calc(100vw \- 3rem);  
        }  
    }  
\</style\>

\<\!-- Mensajes de Django \--\>  
{% if messages %}  
\<div class\="login-messages"\>  
    {% for message in messages %}  
    \<div class\="alert alert-{{ message.tags }} alert-dismissible fade show shadow" role\="alert"\>  
        {{ message }}  
        \<button type\="button" class\="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss\="alert" aria-label\="Close"\>\</button\>  
    \</div\>  
    {% endfor %}  
\</div\>  
{% endif %}

\<div class\="login-split-container"\>  
    {% if user.is\_authenticated %}  
    \<\!-- Usuario autenticado \- Vista de bienvenida \--\>  
    \<div class\="login-left-section" style\="flex: 2;"\>  
        \<div class\="login-rocket-icon"\>  
            🚀  
        \</div\>  
        \<div class\="login-welcome-text text-start mt-4"\>  
            \<h1\>👏🏼 Registrados en el sistema\!\</h1\>  
             
            \<div class\="records-table-wrapper mt-4"\>  
                \<table class\="table table-hover records-table"\>  
                    \<thead\>  
                        \<tr\>  
                            \<th scope\="col"\>\#\</th\>  
                            \<th scope\="col"\>Nombre\</th\>  
                            \<th\>Apellido\</th\>  
                            \<th\>Email\</th\>  
                            \<th\>Teléfono\</th\>  
                            \<th\>Dirección\</th\>  
                            \<th\>Ciudad\</th\>  
                            \<th\>Estado\</th\>  
                            \<th\>Código Postal\</th\>  
                            \<th\>Fecha de Creación\</th\>  
                        \</tr\>  
                    \</thead\>  
                    \<tbody\>  
                        {% if records %}  
                            {% for record in records %}  
                                \<tr class\="{% cycle 'table-active' '' %}"\>  
                                    \<th scope\="row"\>{{ forloop.counter }}\</th\>  
                                    \<td data-label\="Nombre"\>{{ record.first\_name }}\</td\>  
                                    \<td data-label\="Apellido"\>{{ record.last\_name }}\</td\>  
                                    \<td data-label\="Email"\>{{ record.email }}\</td\>  
                                    \<td data-label\="Teléfono"\>{{ record.phone }}\</td\>  
                                    \<td data-label\="Dirección"\>{{ record.address }}\</td\>  
                                    \<td data-label\="Ciudad"\>{{ record.city }}\</td\>  
                                    \<td data-label\="Estado"\>{{ record.state }}\</td\>  
                                    \<td data-label\="Código Postal"\>{{ record.zip\_code }}\</td\>  
                                    \<td data-label\="Fecha de Creación"\>{{ record.created\_at }}\</td\>  
                                \</tr\>  
                            {% endfor %}  
                        {% else %}  
                            \<tr\>  
                                \<td colspan\="10" class\="records-empty text-center"\>No hay registros disponibles.\</td\>  
                            \</tr\>  
                        {% endif %}  
                    \</tbody\>  
                \</table\>  
            \</div\>  
        \</div\>  
    \</div\>  
    \<div class\="login-right-section" style\="flex: 1; justify-content: center; align-items: center;"\>  
        \<div class\="text-center"\>  
            \<h3 class\="text-primary mb-4"\>✋🏼 Hola, {{ user.username }}\</h3\>  
            \<a href\="{% url 'logout' %}" class\="btn btn-outline-danger"\>Cerrar sesión\</a\>  
        \</div\>  
    \</div\>

    {% else %}  
    \<\!-- Usuario no autenticado \- Formulario de login \--\>  
    \<div class\="login-left-section"\>  
        \<div class\="login-rocket-icon"\>  
            🚀  
        \</div\>  
        \<div class\="login-welcome-text"\>  
            \<h1\>Welcome\</h1\>  
            \<p\>You are 30 seconds away from earning your own money\!\</p\>  
        \</div\>  
    \</div\>

    \<div class\="login-right-section"\>  
        \<div class\="login-header"\>  
            \<h2\>🔐 Login\</h2\>  
        \</div\>

        \<form method\="POST" action\="{% url 'home' %}" novalidate\>  
            {% csrf\_token %}

            \<div class\="mb-4"\>  
                \<label for\="username" class\="login-form-label login-required"\>Usuario\</label\>  
                \<div class\="login-input-group"\>  
                    \<span class\="login-input-group-text"\>👤\</span\>  
                    \<input type\="text" class\="login-form-control login-with-icon" name\="username" id\="username" placeholder\="Ingresa tu usuario" required\>  
                \</div\>  
                \<div class\="form-text text-muted"\>We'll never share your username with anyone else.\</div\>  
            \</div\>

            \<div class\="mb-4"\>  
                \<label for\="password" class\="login-form-label login-required"\>Password\</label\>  
                \<div class\="login-input-group"\>  
                    \<span class\="login-input-group-text"\>🔒\</span\>  
                    \<input type\="password" class\="login-form-control login-with-icon" id\="password" name\="password" placeholder\="••••••••" required\>  
                    \<button class\="btn btn-outline-secondary" type\="button" id\="togglePassword" style\="border-left: none;"\>  
                        👁️  
                    \</button\>  
                \</div\>  
            \</div\>

            \<div class\="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3"\>  
                \<div class\="form-check"\>  
                    \<input class\="form-check-input" type\="checkbox" id\="remember" name\="remember"\>  
                    \<label class\="form-check-label text-muted" for\="remember"\>  
                        Recordarme  
                    \</label\>  
                \</div\>  
                \<a href\="\#" class\="text-decoration-none" style\="color: var(--primary-blue);"\>¿Olvidaste tu contraseña?\</a\>  
            \</div\>

            \<button type\="submit" class\="btn login-btn"\>  
                Login →  
            \</button\>  
        \</form\>  
    \</div\>  
    {% endif %}  
\</div\>

\<script\>  
    // Toggle password visibility  
    document.getElementById('togglePassword')?.addEventListener('click', function() {  
        const passwordInput \= document.getElementById('password');

        if (passwordInput.type \=== 'password') {  
            passwordInput.type \= 'text';  
            this.textContent \= '🙈';  
        } else {  
            passwordInput.type \= 'password';  
            this.textContent \= '👁️';  
        }  
    });

    // Auto-cerrar mensajes después de 5 segundos  
    setTimeout(function() {  
        const alerts \= document.querySelectorAll('.alert');  
        alerts.forEach(alert \=\> {  
            const bsAlert \= new bootstrap.Alert(alert);  
            bsAlert.close();  
        });  
    }, 5000);  
\</script\>

{% endblock %}

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image2]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image3]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image4]: <data:image/png;base64,>
